title: State Property Taxation; Rate Limitation
doc_html:
§19. State Property Taxation; Rate Limitation

            Section 19. State taxation on property for all purposes shall not exceed an annual rate of five and three-quarter mills on the dollar of assessed valuation.
doc_text:
§19.  State Property Taxation; Rate Limitation
Section 19.  State taxation on property for all purposes shall not exceed an annual rate
of five and three-quarter mills on the dollar of assessed valuation.
